skill1.kitLine: Activates at battle start + on entering Burst Stage 2 — Bullet Snatch: removes 5% ammo from all enemies; fills own ammo pouch to 6,000 (max 6,000), continuous, unremovable
skill1.note: Resource/defensive bullet-steal + pouch-fill; skipped as inert for damage (pouch treated as never-dry per note).

skill1.kitLine: Full Charge while NOT in Full Burst — Effect 1: expends 100 ammo from pouch
skill1.note: Ammo spend dropped; pouch bookkeeping inert (spend stays well under 6000).

skill1.kitLine: Full Charge while NOT in Full Burst — Effect 2: ATK ▲ 30.5% for 3 sec (self)
skill1.note: trigger shotFired + fbGate:outFb (hard cutoff; SR full-charge approximated as shotFired). Note flags ~3s of in-game carryover into FB is lost = slight undercount.

skill1.kitLine: Full Charge while NOT in Full Burst — Effect 3: Attack Damage ▲ 30.5% for 3 sec (self)
skill1.note: Same block/gate as the ATK buff.

skill2.kitLine: Full Charge during Full Burst — Effect 1: expends 300 ammo from pouch (self)
Full Charge during Full Burst — Effect 2: all allies ATK ▲ 25.2% of skill user's ATK for 3 sec continuously
skill2.note: trigger shotFired + fbGate:inFb; continuous while she fires in FB. Caveat: kept alive by SWAPPED shots — unverified if swap weapon full-charges.

skill2.kitLine: Full Charge during Full Burst — Effect 3: all allies Charge Damage ▲ 100.8% for 3 sec
skill2.note: Same block/gate as the caster-ATK team buff.

skill2.kitLine: After landing 50 normal attacks during Full Burst — Effect 1: expends 300 ammo from pouch (self)
After landing 50 normal attacks during Full Burst — Effect 2: self Attack Damage ▲ 15.03% for 5 sec
skill2.note: trigger hitCount:50 + fbGate:inFb. SR lands ~10 hits/FB window so procs rarely; kept for fidelity (draft used hitCount 100 fudge, now corrected to 50).

skill2.kitLine: After landing 50 normal attacks during Full Burst — Effect 3: target takes 400.92% of final ATK as additional damage
skill2.note: trigger hitCount:50 + fbGate:inFb; same rare-proc caveat.

burst.kitLine: Affects self — Changes weapon in use: Damage 7% of final ATK, Duration 10 sec
burst.note: trigger burstCast. Swap shot economy (fire rate, charge bucket) is a materialized parser estimate, NOT hand-verified — engine fires ~10 swapped shots/10s (60f cycle, no bolt gap) each carrying the SR charge-damage bucket on top of 7%.

burst.kitLine: Additional Effect — Attack Damage ▲ 34.52% for 10 sec (self)
Weapon-change spec (swap weapon charge time / ammo / Full Charge Damage that pins swap shot economy)
burst.note: Verbatim text not available to audit; flagged as the unverified input behind the swap economy estimate.

documentedConfounds.text: skill2 team buff (ATK 25.2% caster + Charge Damage 100.8%) kept alive by SWAPPED shots during her own 10s burst weapon-swap; kit requires a Full Charge attack; unverified whether the swap weapon full-charges (needs footage).
documentedConfounds.why: ks-extract finding names this as the plausible ~1.068 HOT contributor: if the swap weapon does NOT full-charge, the team buff should drop during swap shots and the sim over-buffs. swapGate:unswapped is the fix-if-confirmed.

documentedConfounds.text: burst swap shot economy is a materialized parser estimate, not hand-verified — engine fires ~10 swapped shots/10s (60f cycle, no bolt gap) each carrying her SR charge-damage bucket on top of the 7% multiplier.
documentedConfounds.why: If the swap fires fewer shots or does not carry the full SR charge-damage bucket, the burst-window damage is overcounted; this is unverified and directly scales the HOT residual.

documentedConfounds.text: burst Additional Effect weapon-change spec (swap charge time / ammo / Full Charge Damage) — verbatim text not available.
documentedConfounds.why: This missing spec is exactly what would pin the swap shot economy in caveat #2; its absence is why the swap is an estimate.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 self ATK/Attack-Damage buff is text-gated 'while NOT in Full Burst'; fbGate:outFb is a hard cutoff — in-game ~3s of carryover into each FB window is lost.
documentedConfounds.why: This is a documented slight UNDERCOUNT (drops buff uptime at FB edges), so it pushes the ratio down — opposite to the observed HOT; it partially offsets, not causes, the gap.

documentedConfounds.text: OPEN: if the pouch refill required HER OWN stage-2 cast, a never-bursting Velvet would run dry in ~2 rotations and lose all skill buffs — revisit if she still reads hot.
documentedConfounds.why: Hypothetical undercount scenario for a never-bursting config; the probe comp bursts, so it is not manifesting and cannot explain the current HOT reading.

documentedConfounds.text: All ammo-pouch spend/fill lines (S1 bullet-snatch + 100 spend; S2 300 spend x2) deliberately dropped.
documentedConfounds.why: Pouch refills to 6000 at battle start + every Burst Stage 2 entry and per-rotation spend stays well under 6000, so every ammo-gated effect fires at full uptime — inert for damage.

authorIntentSummary: The author hand-verified Velvet against a real scope-lock wind-weak T5 probe run (1.50 -> 1.05) and models the damage-relevant buffs/procs: S1 self ATK 30.5% + Attack Damage 30.5% (gated outFb), S2 team buff casterAtk 25.2% + Charge Damage 100.8% (gated inFb, shotFired) plus the corrected 50-hit proc (400.92% + self 15.03%/5s), and the burst weaponSwap 7%/shot + Attack Damage 34.52%/10s. Ammo-pouch bookkeeping is deliberately dropped as inert (pouch never runs dry). The known-not-faithful spots are the burst swap shot economy — a materialized parser estimate (~10 shots/10s carrying the SR charge bucket) that is NOT hand-verified — and the unverified question of whether the swap weapon full-charges (which keeps the S2 team buff alive); both are the prime suspects for the residual HOT (1.059) reading.
